channel.title: Beacon Heartbeats Blog
channel.description: Beacon tutorials for AI agent coordination.

item.title: Beacon Contracts and Mayday Signals for Reliable AI Agents
item.description: A practical Beacon tutorial for combining signed heartbeats, contracts, and mayday escalation in AI agent systems.

item.title: Getting Started with Beacon 2.x: Heartbeats for AI Agents
item.description: A practical Beacon 2.6+ tutorial covering signed heartbeats, contracts, mayday signals, and a copy-paste Python heartbeat demo.
